subtitle.disabled: Automate refreshes without subscription limits—set cadence and failure guards freely.

fields.automationHelp: Pause to temporarily stop future runs.

generator.unconfiguredProviders: {providers} not configured. Visit Settings → Plugins to set up before generating.
generator.promptPlaceholder: Describe what items should be generated for this directory...
generator.promptHelperText: Be specific about the type of content you want to generate
generator.companyInfoDescription: Optional company details for branded content
generator.categoriesDescription: Define categories and keywords for content organization
generator.sourceUrlsDescription: Add specific URLs to extract content from
generator.noSourceUrlsMessage: No source URLs added. The generator will use search to find content.
generator.updateWithPullRequestDescription: Create a pull request instead of direct commits
generator.enableBadgeEvaluationDescription: Evaluate and add quality badges to items
generator.captureScreenshotsDescription: Automatically capture screenshots or product images for each item during generation
generator.aiFirstGenerationDescription: Enable AI-generation of initial items before web search.
generator.recreateConfirmDescription: Recreate will delete existing items and regenerate them from scratch. This action cannot be undone.
generator.recreateInlineDescription: This mode deletes current items and rebuilds them from scratch. Proceed only if you want to replace everything.
generator.companyNameDescription: Used to personalize generated content with your brand identity.
generator.companyWebsiteDescription: AI will analyze your website to better understand your brand context.
generator.initialCategoriesDescription: Seed categories to organize items. The AI will use these as a starting point.
generator.priorityCategoriesDescription: Categories that will appear first in the generated output. Useful for highlighting important sections.
generator.targetKeywordsDescription: Keywords to guide the AI search and content generation. More specific keywords yield better results.
generator.sourceUrlsFieldDescription: Specific URLs to extract content from. If empty, the generator will search the web automatically.
generator.generationMethodDescription: Choose whether to update existing items or recreate everything from scratch.
generator.websiteRepositoryCreationMethodDescripti: How the website repository is created. Template is recommended for most cases.
generator.maxSearchQueriesDescription: Number of search queries the AI will generate to find relevant content (1-50).
generator.resultsPerQueryDescription: Maximum results to retrieve per search query (1-20).
generator.maxPagesToProcessDescription: Maximum web pages to process for content extraction (1-100).
generator.relevanceThresholdDescription: Minimum relevance score (0-1) for content to be included. Higher values mean stricter filtering.
generator.dataGenerationDescription: Configure data volume and entity generation
generator.generateCategoriesDescription: Create category structure for organizing items
generator.generateTagsDescription: Create tags for flexible item labeling
generator.generateBrandsDescription: Extract and create brand entities from items
generator.standardPipelineDescription: Use the step-by-step pipeline with individual provider selection
generator.providerSelectionDescription: Choose which providers to use for each capability
generator.searchProviderDescription: Provider for web search and content discovery
generator.screenshotProviderDescription: Provider for capturing screenshots of items
generator.aiProviderDescription: AI model provider for content generation and extraction
generator.contentExtractorProviderDescription: Provider for extracting content from web pages
generator.notConfiguredTooltip: This provider requires configuration. Visit Settings → Plugins to set it up.
